items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any specific tests or confirmations related to the agent-specific rate limits mentioned in the exploratory step. While there are multiple prior steps that indicate successful bookings and user interactions, none of them address the specific requirement of validating the behavior of agent-specific rate limits. Therefore, without concrete evidence to support this requirement, the validation remains inconclusive.
